tech_issue: Technical problems with application, website errors, or login issues
deadlines: Dates, deadlines, and timeline of the admission campaign
docs_submission: Required documents, how to submit files, and fixing application errors
status_check: Application tracking, appearance in contest lists, and confirmation
admission_scores: Passing scores, competition level, and chances of admission
finance_contracts: Tuition fees, payment methods, and education contracts
enrollment: Final enrollment steps, consent forms, and admission orders
dormitory: Dormitory housing, check-in rules, and accommodation costs
academic_info: Class schedules, student IDs, and start of the semester
events: Open house days, excursions, and applicant meetings
general_info: General university contacts, address, and military department
program_consult: Advice on choosing a major or comparing study programs
